'''pazhava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadheading|deadheading]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadheading|deadheading]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pazhava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzhævæth|pæzhævæth]] || [[word:pæzhævæj|pæzhævæj]] || [[word:pæzhævæsh|pæzhævæsh]] || [[word:pæzhævæ|pæzhævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhazhavath|pazhazhavath]] || [[word:pazhazhavaj|pazhazhavaj]] || [[word:pazhazhavash|pazhazhavash]] || [[word:pazhazhava|pazhazhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhavath|pazhavath]] || [[word:pazhavaj|pazhavaj]] || [[word:pazhavash|pazhavash]] || [[word:pazhava|pazhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhafvath|pazhafvath]] || [[word:pazhafvaj|pazhafvaj]] || [[word:pazhafvash|pazhafvash]] || [[word:pazhafvaf|pazhafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazhavatha|pazhavatha]] || [[word:pazhavaja|pazhavaja]] || [[word:pazhavasha|pazhavasha]] || [[word:pazhavaka|pazhavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazhavath|pazhavath]] || [[word:pazhavaj|pazhavaj]] || [[word:pazhavash|pazhavash]] || [[word:pazhava|pazhava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazhavathal|pazhavathal]] || [[word:pazhavajal|pazhavajal]] || [[word:pazhavashal|pazhavashal]] || [[word:pazhavakal|pazhavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazhavathatha|pazhavathatha]] || [[word:pazhavajaja|pazhavajaja]] || [[word:pazhavashasha|pazhavashasha]] || [[word:pazhavaka|pazhavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazhavathan|pazhavathan]] || [[word:pazhavajan|pazhavajan]] || [[word:pazhavashan|pazhavashan]] || [[word:pazhavakan|pazhavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazhavathaoro|pazhavathaoro]] || [[word:pazhavajaoro|pazhavajaoro]] || [[word:pazhavashaoro|pazhavashaoro]] || [[word:pazhavakaoro|pazhavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
